from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    subject_map = {}
    predicate_map = {
        "cityServed": "serves the city of {}",
        "mayor": "where the mayor is {}",
        "isPartOf": "is part of {}",
        "operatingOrganisation": "is operated by {}",
        "location": "is located in {}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "has an elevation of {} metres above sea level",
        "runwayLength": "has a runway length of {} metres",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": "has a first runway surface type of {}",
        "3rdRunwayLengthFeet": "has a third runway length of {} feet",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": "has an ICAO location identifier of {}",
        "locationIdentifier": "has a location identifier of {}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": "has an elevation of {} feet above sea level",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": "has an IATA location identifier of {}",
        "nativeName": "has a native name of {}",
        "leaderParty": "has a leader party of {}",
        "language": "speaks {}",
        "capital": "has {} as its capital",
        "country": "is located in {}",
        "owner": "is owned by {}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": "has a first runway length of {} feet",
        "4thRunwaySurfaceType": "has a fourth runway surface type of {}",
        "5thRunwayNumber": "has a fifth runway number of {}",
        "largestCity": "has the largest city of {}",
        "4thRunwayLengthFeet": "has a fourth runway length of {} feet",
        "1stRunwayNumber": "has a first runway number of {}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": "has an elevation of {} metres above sea level",
        "administrativeArrondissement": "is part of the administrative arrondissement of {}",
        "mayor": "has a mayor of {}",
        "2ndRunwaySurfaceType": "has a second runway surface type of {}",
        "3rdRunwaySurfaceType": "has a third runway surface type of {}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": "has a runway surface type of {}",
        "officialLanguage": "has an official language of {}",
        "city": "is located in the city of {}",
        "jurisdiction": "is under the jurisdiction of {}",
        "demonym": "has a demonym of {}",
        "aircraftHelicopter": "has an aircraft helicopter of {}",
        "transportAircraft": "has a transport aircraft of {}",
        "currency": "has a currency of {}",
        "headquarter": "has its headquarter in {}",
        "class": "is a member of the class {}",
        "division": "is a member of the division {}",
        "order": "is a member of the order {}",
        "regionServed": "serves the region of {}",
        "leaderTitle": "has a leader title of {}",
        "hubAirport": "has a hub airport of {}",
        "aircraftFighter": "has an aircraft fighter of {}",
        "attackAircraft": "has an attack aircraft of {}",
        "battle": "has been involved in the battle of {}",
        "5thRunwaySurfaceType": "has a fifth runway surface type of {}",
        "countySeat": "is the county seat of {}",
        "chief": "has a chief of {}",
        "foundedBy": "was founded by {}",
        "postalCode": "has a postal code of {}",
        "areaCode": "has an area code of {}",
        "foundingYear": "was founded in the year {}",
        "ceremonialCounty": "is part of the ceremonial county of {}"
    }
    for triple in triples:
        if triple.subject not in subject_map:
            subject_map[triple.subject] = []
        subject_map[triple.subject].append((triple.predicate, triple.object))

    sentence = ""
    for subject, triples in subject_map.items():
        if sentence:
            sentence += " which "
        sentence += f"{subject} "
        for i, (predicate, obj) in enumerate(triples):
            if predicate in predicate_map:
                sentence += predicate_map[predicate].format(obj)
            else:
                sentence += f"has a {predicate} of {obj}"
            if i < len(triples) - 1:
                sentence += ", "
    return sentence + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
